title: [Task Sprint] QA Testing Report — Villume Admin

issues.display_title: Issue #1599: [Integration] Login (/login) — real auth, Google, redirect
issues.main_description_html:
Epic A — Auth · Login (/login)

Wire Login to the real backend.

Scope

  • Real auth service (replace the prototype's simulated submit).
  • Real Google OAuth; "Forgot password?" → /forgot-password; "Sign up" → /signup.
  • Validation + error states; honor existing post-login redirect.

Acceptance criteria

  • Valid creds log in and redirect correctly; invalid creds show errors; Google login works.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Log in with valid credentials → authenticated + redirected as expected.
  2. Wrong password → inline error; no navigation.
  3. Empty fields → validation blocks submit.
  4. "Log in with Google" → real OAuth completes.
  5. "Forgot password?" → /forgot-password.

Demo by Developer

2026-06-09.17-11-39.mp4

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1599: Login (/login) real auth, Google, redirect

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/auth/issue_1599_login_integration.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium) and qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1599-dev-flow.cjs (Chrome headed/maximized - FFmpeg desktop recording)
Env: Development https://dev.villume.com
Account: testergothru@gmail.com

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White login_route /login -> Login page/form renders TP Fail
2 White valid_credentials valid credentials -> authenticated and redirected TP Pass
3 Gray invalid_password wrong password -> error and no authenticated navigation TP Pass
4 Gray empty_fields empty submit -> validation blocks submit and shows error states TP Partial
5 Gray forgot_password_link Forgot password -> /forgot-password TP Fail
6 Gray signup_link Sign up -> /signup TP Fail
7 Gray google_login_entry Google login is real OAuth entry TP Partial
8 Gray responsive_theme Login/sign-up modal works in desktop/mobile light/dark Desktop + mobile Pass
9 Task Sprint #1599 acceptance /login real auth, Google OAuth, redirect, validation, forgot/signup routes TP + FN Fail

Frontend Status & Review

Area Expected Actual Review
/login route Dedicated login page/form /login responds 200 OK but renders a Galleries shell, not #login-email / #login-pw Fail
Valid login Real auth service logs in and redirects Valid tester credentials log in and redirect to /testergothru Pass
Invalid login Inline/error state and no navigation Wrong password keeps login modal open and displays login failure messaging Pass
Empty fields Validation blocks submit and shows required field errors Continue is disabled, so submit is blocked; required error messages are not surfaced by clicking disabled submit Partial
Forgot password Link navigates to /forgot-password Link opens forgot-password modal on /, not route navigation Fail
Sign up Link navigates to /signup Link switches modal to sign-up form on /; /signup route does not render sign-up form Fail
Google OAuth Real OAuth completes Google Identity button/widget renders; full OAuth completion was not executed because it requires an interactive Google account session Partial

Response Code & Review

Request Response Content-Type Review
GET https://dev.villume.com/login 200 OK text/html; charset=utf-8 Route shell responds, but does not contain the login form expected by issue scope.
GET https://dev.villume.com/forgot-password 200 OK text/html; charset=utf-8 Forgot-password route exists and renders forgot content, but login modal link does not navigate there.
GET https://dev.villume.com/signup 200 OK text/html; charset=utf-8 Route shell responds, but no sign-up form/page content was detected.
POST auth via UI Success with valid tester credentials Authenticated UI Valid login flow works and redirects to /testergothru.

Code Review

File Review
src/app/routes/auth.routes.ts:5 Only forgot-password, reset-password, and resettoken auth routes are defined; no /login or /signup route is present.
src/app/layouts/login/login.component.html:6 Login modal includes #login-email.
src/app/layouts/login/login.component.html:33 Login modal includes #login-pw.
src/app/layouts/login/login.component.html:27 Forgot password link calls component action, not route navigation.
src/app/layouts/login/login.component.ts:58 Login uses mainService.auth(this.form.value), so real backend auth is wired for credential login.
src/app/layouts/login/login.component.ts:112 Verified login redirects to /<username> when no special login source is active.
src/app/layouts/login/login.component.ts:163 forgotPassword() opens the modal forgot-password flow by setting displayForgotPasswordDialog, rather than routing to /forgot-password.
src/app/layouts/layouts.component.html:70 Login UI is embedded inside a dialog (Welcome back), not a /login page.
src/app/layouts/layouts.component.html:100 Sign up link switches modal form type, not route navigation to /signup.
src/app/layouts/layouts.component.ts:379 Google Identity renderButton is used, confirming real Google widget rendering.

Evidence

Type File
Desktop light qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1599-final-desktop-light.png
Desktop dark qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1599-final-desktop-dark.png
Mobile light qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1599-final-mobile-light.png
Mobile dark qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1599-final-mobile-dark.png
Address-bar video qa_testing/reports/videos/issue-1599-final-address-bar.mp4

Bug Notes

  • Issue #1599 acceptance is not fully met because /login and /signup do not render dedicated auth pages.
  • Forgot password link from login does not navigate to /forgot-password; it opens a modal on /.
  • Empty fields are blocked by disabled Continue, but required error text does not appear from an empty submit attempt.
  • Credential login itself is functional: valid credentials authenticate and invalid password shows an error.
  • Google widget renders, but full OAuth completion was not tested without an interactive Google test account.
  • Because explicit scope items fail, add labels Bug, Sanity Testing, and assign ekosy9.

Screenshots

Desktop screenshot - dark mode:

Desktop screenshot - light mode:

Mobile screenshot - dark mode:

Mobile screenshot - light mode:

Video Recording

issue-1599-final-address-bar.mp4

Note from Developer

Please test it again, using the correct flow instead of following the description.

Type: Slicing (frontend build) · Epic: Password recovery

Build the full-page Email sent confirmation by reusing the existing .confirm layout (Welcome/404 family).

Scope: eyebrow "Password reset", H1 "Email sent", lede, email chip, Back to log in + Resend email (30s cooldown + aria-live status), spam-folder note.

Acceptance: reuses .confirm; resend respects cooldown; status announced to AT; dark mode + responsive.

Part of the Settings & Password-Recovery redesign (Frontend).
Refs: docs/brainstorm/05-06-2026/ui-setting-email-password/plan.md · brainstorming.md

Demo by Developer

2026-06-11.17-00-08.mp4

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1650: Build "Email Sent" Confirmation Page

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/authentication/issue_1650_email_sent_confirmation.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium) and qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1650-dev-flow.cjs (Chrome headed/maximized - FFmpeg desktop recording)
Env: Development https://dev.villume.com
Account: Not required. Forgot-password API and reCAPTCHA are mocked in the spec.

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 Black open_forgot_password_from_login home -> click login popup -> click Forgot password? -> forgot-password modal renders TP Pass
2 Gray submit_forgot_password mocked reCAPTCHA + mocked API success -> email sent confirmation renders in the auth flow TP Pass
3 White confirm_layout email sent confirmation -> reuses .confirm with .confirm-inner and eyebrow Password reset TP Fail
4 Black confirmation_content success page -> H1 Email sent, lede, email chip, Back to log in, Resend email, spam note TP Blocked by #3
5 Black resend_cooldown click resend -> 30s cooldown and aria-live status announcement TP Blocked by #3
6 Black responsive_dark confirmation page -> usable in mobile dark mode without horizontal overflow Mobile + dark Blocked by #3
7 Task Sprint #1650 acceptance .confirm layout + resend cooldown + AT status + dark/responsive TP Fail

Frontend Status & Review

Area Expected Actual Review
Confirmation layout Reuse .confirm layout from Welcome/404 family Current login-popup forgot-password success state renders .auth-card--sent Fail
Eyebrow Password reset Not rendered Fail
Title Email sent Current heading is Check your inbox, not the requested H1 Fail
Email chip Submitted email displayed in chip Current email is inline bold text, not .confirm-email chip Fail
Back to log in Link/button visible on confirmation Rendered, but inside legacy auth card rather than .confirm action set Fail
Resend email Button visible with 30s cooldown Not rendered Fail
Assistive technology status Resend status announced via aria-live Not rendered Fail
Spam-folder note Confirmation includes spam-folder guidance Not rendered Fail
Responsive/dark mode Confirmation follows new .confirm visual language Current page uses legacy fixed padding styles Fail

Response Code & Review

Request Response Content-Type Review
GET https://dev.villume.com/ 200 OK text/html; charset=utf-8 Landing route loads; test opens login popup and then forgot-password modal.
POST **/v1/auth/password/forgot 200 OK mocked application/json Mocked to make slicing validation deterministic and avoid sending real reset email.

Code Review

File Review
src/app/layouts/login/login.component.html:23 Login popup exposes the Forgot password? entry point used by the tested flow.
src/app/layouts/forgot-password-modal/forgot-password-modal.component.html:48 Success state renders .auth-card--sent, not the requested .confirm layout.
src/app/layouts/forgot-password-modal/forgot-password-modal.component.html:56 Heading is Check your inbox, not H1 Email sent.
src/app/layouts/forgot-password-modal/forgot-password-modal.component.html:59 Submitted email is inline .auth-email, not an email chip.
src/app/layouts/forgot-password-modal/forgot-password-modal.component.html:69 Resend is represented as Try again; there is no Resend email button, 30s cooldown, or aria-live status.
src/app/layouts/forgot-password-modal/forgot-password-modal.component.ts:63 API success only sets showSentEmail = true; no cooldown/status state is created.

Evidence

Type File
Desktop light qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1650-email-sent-desktop-light.png
Desktop dark qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1650-email-sent-desktop-dark.png
Mobile light qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1650-email-sent-mobile-light.png
Mobile dark qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1650-email-sent-mobile-dark.png
Address-bar video qa_testing/reports/videos/issue-1650-email-sent-address-bar.mp4
Error context qa_testing/test-results/e2e-authentication-issue_1-901b8-650-email-sent-confirmation-chromium/error-context.md

Bug Notes

  • Issue #1650 acceptance is not met yet because the success page does not reuse .confirm.
  • The automation reaches the email-sent state with mocked reCAPTCHA/API, then fails on .confirm, which is the intended acceptance guard.
  • Visual evidence is captured from https://dev.villume.com/ via login popup -> forgot password; the video is a desktop recording with the browser address bar visible.
  • No extra test data is required for this QA case.

Please test it again, using the correct flow instead of following the description.

Type: Slicing (frontend build) · Epic: Settings

Rebuild account-setting.component on the new design system.

Scope: private email; Change password disclosure (current/new/confirm with show/hide toggles); birth date; time zone; Gender as a proper radio group; Save; danger zone → delete account (keep confirm flow).

Defect fix: gender currently uses (click) on <label> instead of real radio binding — bind to a reactive radio group.

Decision: keep the existing 6-character password minimum (no policy change here).

Acceptance: fields render + save; gender bound correctly; change-password disclosure works; delete-account confirm intact.

Depends on: _Add Settings Styles To dashboard.scss.

Part of the Settings & Password-Recovery redesign (Frontend).
Refs: docs/brainstorm/05-06-2026/ui-setting-email-password/plan.md · brainstorming.md

Demo by Developer

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/settings/issue_1647_account_settings.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium) and qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1647-dev-flow.cjs (Chrome headed/maximized - FFmpeg desktop recording)
Env: Development https://dev.villume.com
Account: testergothru@gmail.com

2 White account_fields_render logged-in user -> private email, birth date, time zone, gender, save, and danger zone render TP Pass
3 Gray change_password_disclosure click Change password -> current/new/confirm password fields and show/hide toggle are available TP Pass
4 Gray password_minimum_copy password form -> 6-character minimum remains visible/enforced TP Pass
5 Gray delete_confirm_flow click Delete account -> confirm dialog appears and cancel keeps account intact TP Pass
6 Gray responsive_theme Account Settings remains usable in desktop/mobile light/dark views Desktop + mobile Pass
7 Task Sprint gender_reactive_binding gender must use a reactive radio group, not ngModel/label-click binding FN Fail
8 Task Sprint #1647 acceptance all fields render + save, password disclosure works, delete confirm intact, gender bound reactively TP + FN Fail

Frontend Status & Review

Area Expected Actual Review
Account settings fields Private email, birth date, time zone, gender, save button, and danger zone render Verified on desktop and mobile screenshots Pass
Change password Disclosure opens with password fields and show/hide controls Verified in final video and mobile dark screenshot Pass
Password minimum Keep 6-character minimum Code uses Validators.minLength(6) and UI placeholder says At least 6 characters Pass
Delete account confirm Confirm flow remains intact Verified: modal copy Delete this account? with Delete account and Cancel actions appears Pass
Gender binding Reactive radio group Current Account Settings uses [(ngModel)]="selectedGender" on p-radioButton Fail
Responsive views Chrome maximized, web viewport emulates mobile Verified with desktop/mobile light/dark screenshots and address-bar video Pass

Response Code & Review

Request Response Content-Type Review
GET https://dev.villume.com/settings/account 200 OK text/html; charset=utf-8 Route shell loads successfully with authenticated UI after login.

Code Review

File Review

src/app/pages/settings/account-setting/account-setting.component.html:51 Time zone select exposes inputId="a-tz", matching the expected field.
src/app/pages/settings/account-setting/account-setting.component.html:68 Gender radio group uses [(ngModel)]="selectedGender" instead of a reactive formControlName, which misses the explicit issue requirement.
src/app/pages/settings/account-setting/account-setting.component.ts:162 New password validator keeps Validators.minLength(6).
src/app/pages/settings/account-setting/account-setting.component.ts:332 Save payload sends birth_date, gender, and timezone.
src/app/pages/profile/user-update/user-update.component.html:89 Existing Profile Update page shows the desired reactive pattern with formControlName="gender", useful as reference for the Account Settings fix.

issues.display_title: Issue #1632: [slicing] Add My Galleries unit spec
issues.main_description_html:
Epic: My Galleries

Add main.component.spec.ts covering render + key interactions (search, sort, delete, bulk delete).

Acceptance: spec passes in CI; covers the new search/sort/bulk paths.

Depends on: the My Galleries implementation tasks.

Part of the My Galleries authenticated-surface redesign.
Refs: docs/brainstorm/05-06-2026/my galleries/plan.md · brainstorming.md

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1632: Add My Galleries unit spec

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/my-galleries/issue_1632_unit_spec_coverage.spec.ts (Playwright source/coverage assertion) and qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1632-dev-flow.cjs (Chrome headed/maximized - FFmpeg desktop recording)
Env: Development https://dev.villume.com/testergothru
Flow: Verify source coverage requirement for src/app/pages/profile/main/main.component.spec.ts, then capture My Galleries/Profile runtime evidence on dev.

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White unit_spec_exists repo contains src/app/pages/profile/main/main.component.spec.ts TP Fail
2 White render_spec_coverage unit spec covers component render/create behavior TP Fail
3 Gray search_spec_coverage unit spec covers My Galleries search path TP Fail
4 Gray sort_spec_coverage unit spec covers My Galleries sort path TP Fail
5 Gray delete_spec_coverage unit spec covers single gallery delete path TP Fail
6 Gray bulk_delete_spec_coverage unit spec covers selected/bulk delete path TP Fail
7 Gray runtime_controls_probe dev profile surface exposes search/sort/select/bulk delete controls Desktop + mobile Fail
8 Gray theme_responsive_evidence capture light/dark and mobile/desktop evidence while Chrome stays maximized Desktop light/dark + mobile light/dark Pass
9 Task Sprint #1632 acceptance spec passes in CI and covers new search/sort/bulk paths TP + FN Fail

Frontend Status & Review

Flow: https://dev.villume.com/testergothru.

Area Expected Actual Review
Unit spec file src/app/pages/profile/main/main.component.spec.ts exists File not found Fail
Render coverage Spec covers render/create behavior Not possible because spec file is absent Fail
Search coverage Spec covers search path Not found in spec; implementation probe also found searchInputCount=0 Fail
Sort coverage Spec covers sort path Not found in spec; implementation probe also found sortControlCount=0 Fail
Delete coverage Spec covers delete path Component has single confirmDelete/deleteExhibition, but no unit spec exists Fail
Bulk delete coverage Spec covers selected/bulk delete path Selection state exists in TS, but template only exposes Clear/Share; no bulk delete button/path found Fail
Runtime evidence My Galleries/Profile surface captured Runtime loaded as public Galleries because recorder login attempt did not open login form; source-level spec failure remains conclusive Partial
Evidence Video records visible Chrome window including address bar Verified: address bar shows dev.villume.com/testergothru Pass

Response Code & Review

Request Response Content-Type Body Length Review
GET https://dev.villume.com/testergothru 200 OK text/html; charset=utf-8 112603 bytes HTTP shell loads successfully; unit-spec acceptance is still missing in source.

Code Review

File Review
src/app/pages/profile/main/main.component.spec.ts Missing. This directly fails the issue acceptance.
src/app/pages/profile/main/main.component.ts Contains render/data/delete-related logic and selectedIds, but no search/sort methods were found.
src/app/pages/profile/main/main.component.html Renders gallery cards and single delete actions; no visible search input, sort control, gallery checkbox, or bulk delete action was found.
src/app/pages/profile/main/main.component.scss Contains .gcheck and .dash-selbar styles, but the current template does not expose a checkbox control or bulk delete action.
qa_testing/tests/e2e/my-galleries/issue_1632_unit_spec_coverage.spec.ts Added QA guard that fails until the required unit spec and coverage paths exist.

Bug Notes

  • Issue #1632 acceptance is not met because main.component.spec.ts is absent.
  • Search, sort, and bulk delete paths requested by the issue were not found in the current My Galleries component/template.
  • Runtime recorder could not authenticate as owner during this pass, so the screenshot/video show public Galleries; the source/unit-spec failure is independent of login state.

Epic A — Auth · Signup (/signup)

Slice the full-page Signup design (reuses the shared auth layout).

Scope

  • Two-column layout; form: first/last name, email, password (show/hide, min 8), Terms+Privacy consent checkbox, reCAPTCHA placeholder, Create account, Google, "Log in" link.
  • Light + dark; responsive. Markup only.

Acceptance criteria

  • Matches the new Signup design in both themes, all breakpoints.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Compare /signup to Signup.html on desktop & mobile.
  2. Toggle password show/hide.
  3. Dark mode styling correct.
  4. Mobile → fields/columns stack correctly.

Demo by Developer

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1600: Signup page (/signup)

Suite: qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1600-dev-flow.cjs (Playwright - Chrome headed/maximized - FFmpeg desktop recording)
Env: Development https://dev.villume.com/signup
Flow: Open /signup, click Get started, then verify the signup dialog/form.

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White signup_entry_flow open /signup + click Get started -> signup form appears TP Pass
2 White signup_form_content form opened -> first/last name, email, password, consent checkbox, Create account, Google sign-up, and Log in link are visible TP Pass
3 White recaptcha_markup form opened -> reCAPTCHA container exists for signup verification TP Pass with note: external widget was not visibly rendered in the captured frame
4 Gray password_toggle click show/hide password -> password input toggles between hidden and visible TP Pass
5 Gray theme_support switch light/dark -> signup form remains readable and styled correctly Desktop light + desktop dark Pass
6 Gray responsive_mobile emulate mobile viewport while Chrome stays maximized -> signup form remains usable in mobile responsive view Mobile light + mobile dark Pass
7 Black password_min_length issue scope requires password minimum 8 characters -> implementation enforces/copies minimum 8 FN Fail
8 Task Sprint #1600 acceptance Signup.html parity target -> signup form, responsive states, dark mode, and evidence verified TP + FN Partial Pass

Frontend Status & Review

Flow: https://dev.villume.com/signup -> Get started button -> app-sign-up dialog.

Area Expected Actual Review
Entry route /signup can start the signup flow URL remains /signup; clicking Get started opens the signup dialog Pass
Signup component app-sign-up / .auth-form visible Rendered after Get started click Pass
Form fields First name, last name, email, password, consent checkbox visible 5 visible inputs detected: first, last, email, password, checkbox Pass
Create account CTA Visible and disabled/enabled according to form state Visible; disabled until valid form + captcha Pass
Google sign-up Google sign-up option visible Visible as Daftar dengan Google Pass
Log in link Login path for existing user visible Visible as Already have an account? Log in Pass
Password toggle Show/hide control available and functional Toggle button changes password input visibility Pass
Responsive Mobile signup layout remains usable Verified in mobile light and mobile dark screenshots using viewport emulation while browser stays maximized Pass
Evidence Video records visible Chrome window including address bar Verified from extracted frame: address bar shows dev.villume.com/signup Pass

Response Code & Review

Request Response Content-Type Body Length Review
GET https://dev.villume.com/signup 200 OK text/html; charset=utf-8 112603 bytes HTTP shell loads successfully; signup flow is available after clicking Get started.

Code Review

File Review
src/app/layouts/header/header.component.html Desktop header contains the Get started button that opens the signup/login dialog flow.
src/app/layouts/layouts.component.html Shared layout includes <app-sign-up>, which renders the signup form inside the auth dialog.
src/app/layouts/sign-up/sign-up.component.html Required signup fields, consent copy, reCAPTCHA container, Create account button, password toggle, Google sign-up area, and Log in link are present.
src/app/layouts/sign-up/sign-up.component.ts Form validation exists, but password currently uses Validators.minLength(6). Issue #1600 requires minimum 8.
src/app/layouts/sign-up/sign-up.component.html Password placeholder says At least 6 characters and validation copy says Password must be at least 6 characters; both should match the issue requirement of minimum 8.

Bug Notes

  • Password minimum length does not match issue scope: implementation validates/copies 6 characters, while issue #1600 requires minimum 8.
  • reCAPTCHA markup/container is present, but the external widget was not visually rendered in the captured frame; Create account remains disabled until captcha verification.
  • Initial /signup screen shows the page shell/gallery content; the signup form appears after the expected Get started click.

issues.display_title: Issue #1562: [Integration] Shared footer — map links to real routes + dynamic year
issues.main_description_html:
Epic: Shared shell — Footer (integration)

Wire footer links and dynamic content.

Scope

  • Map placeholder # links to real routes: /pricing, /careers, /tutorials, /term-of-service, /privacy-cookie-policy, /catalogue, /about, /contact.
  • Dynamic copyright year (already present — verify).
  • Social links to real profiles.

Acceptance criteria

  • Every footer link navigates to a real, correct destination. No dead # links.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Click every footer link → lands on the correct page (no 404, no #).
  2. Confirm copyright shows the current year.
  3. Click each social icon → opens the correct external profile in a new tab.

Demo by Developer

2026-06-05.14-42-12.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #1677: Fix: {username}/create page auto-redirects to My Gallery on window resize

Bug

On the {username}/create page, resizing the browser window automatically redirects the user to My Gallery. This should not happen.

Steps to Reproduce

  1. Open the {username}/create page
  2. Resize the browser window (make it smaller/larger)
  3. The page automatically redirects to My Gallery

Expected Behavior

Resizing the window on the create page should not force a redirect to My Gallery. The user should stay on the create page.

issues.display_title: Issue #1676: Unify Modal Styling to Match the Login Modal
issues.main_description_html:
Overview

Our login modal has a clean, polished look that sets the standard for how every pop-up window in the app should feel. Over time, many other modals have drifted away from it — different background colors, title sizes, button shapes, and close-button positions. The app ends up feeling inconsistent.

This issue asks us to bring the remaining modals in line with the login modal so the whole product feels like one coherent design.

The reference: login modal

Use the login modal as the source of truth:

  • Component: src/app/layouts/login/login.component.html / .scss

What to do

Review every modal (except for the capital that is on the editor page) and update the ones that don't match so they share the same background, title style, spacing, close-button placement, and button styling — including how they look on tablet and mobile.

Definition of done

  • All modals look and feel consistent with the login modal
  • Titles, spacing, buttons, and close buttons match everywhere
  • Each modal still works and looks good on desktop, tablet, and mobile

issues.display_title: Issue #1675: User Detail Should Be Fetched on the Server Only — Duplicate Client Fetch Causes UI Glitch
issues.main_description_html:
Problem

User detail should be fetched on the server only during initial render. Right now it also runs again in the browser, pointing at a server-internal address that the browser can't reach — so it fails silently.

Symptom

UI glitches — because the fetch runs twice (server, then client), the interface flickers / briefly shows wrong or missing user info.

Expected

Fetch user detail on the server only, once. No duplicate client fetch, no flicker.

Clue

The startup fetch is hardcoded to the internal address and runs with no server/browser check. There's already a smart version of the same fetch elsewhere that picks the right address per platform — use it as reference.

Demo by Developer

Note: Fixed. This is due to a certificate error.

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1675: User Detail Server-Only Initial Fetch

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/profile/issue_1675_user_detail_server_only.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium) and qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1675-dev-flow.cjs (Chrome headed/maximized - FFmpeg desktop recording)
Env: Development https://dev.villume.com
Account: testergothru@gmail.com
Test Data: Existing tester account only; no gallery/profile data was modified.

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 Black login valid tester credential -> authenticated account menu visible TP Pass
2 Gray initial_profile_render_network_probe reload /testergothru with active session -> browser does not request /v1/users/detail Desktop Pass
3 Gray no_internal_browser_fetch hydrated browser runtime -> no browser request to server-internal hosts Desktop Pass
4 Black stable_authenticated_ui initial render + hydration -> account menu and My Galleries remain visible Desktop Pass
5 Regression no_guest_flicker hydrated profile page -> login/guest UI does not appear after user data hydration Desktop Pass
6 Task Sprint #1675 acceptance user detail fetched server-side only during initial render; no duplicate client fetch / no flicker TP Pass

Frontend Status & Review

Area Expected Actual Review
Authenticated profile /testergothru opens as logged-in tester Account menu visible and My Galleries heading rendered Pass
Initial hydration Browser should reuse server-provided user detail data Runtime stayed authenticated after reload Pass
Duplicate user detail fetch Browser should not call /v1/users/detail on initial profile render Captured browser /v1/users/detail requests: 0 Pass
Internal address leak Browser should not call server-internal hosts Captured internal browser requests: 0 Pass
Relevant failed requests No failed /v1/users/detail or server-internal request Captured relevant failed requests: 0 Pass
Visual stability User info/header should not flicker back to guest state Login button not visible after hydration; account menu remains visible Pass

Response Code & Review

Request Response Content-Type Review
GET https://dev.villume.com/ Browser navigation succeeded SPA/SSR HTML Login entry rendered and tester login completed.
POST auth Auth succeeded API response handled by app Account menu became visible for testergothru.
GET https://dev.villume.com/testergothru Browser navigation succeeded SSR/SPA HTML Profile rendered as own profile with My Galleries.
Browser GET */v1/users/detail after monitored reload Not observed N/A Pass: no duplicate browser-side user detail fetch detected.
Browser request to server-internal host Not observed N/A Pass: no unreachable/internal browser request detected.

Code / DOM Review

Area Review
Startup fetch src/app/shared/initializers/user-data.initializer.ts initializes user data before first render.
Browser hydration guard The initializer checks TransferState on browser and applies cached USER_DATA_KEY before attempting fetch.
Server-only data source MainService.getUserProfileServerSide() points to environment.baseURL_GET_go for server-side user detail fetch.
Smart reference pattern MainService.getUserProfile() uses fetchDataFromApi({ _go: true }), which switches base URL by browser/server platform.
Runtime DOM Final evidence state: pathname: /testergothru, hasAccountMenu: true, hasMyGalleries: true, loginButtonVisible: false.
Network probe Final evidence state: userDetailRequests: [], internalRequests: [], failedRequests: [].

Evidence

Type File
Stable profile light qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1675-user-detail-stable-profile-light.png
Network proof overlay light qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1675-user-detail-network-proof-light.png
Stable profile dark qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1675-user-detail-stable-profile-dark.png

Bug Notes

  • No blocking issue found for #1675 on https://dev.villume.com/testergothru.
  • Automated Playwright result: 1 passed.
  • The monitored browser session did not call /v1/users/detail during authenticated initial profile render, which confirms no duplicate client-side user detail fetch in this flow.

issues.display_title: Issue #1655: [integration] Make Forgot-Password A Modal In The Auth Dialog
issues.main_description_html:
Type: Integration (wiring) · Epic: Password recovery

Wire the "Reset your password" modal UI into the shared login/sign-up p-dialog.

Scope: reachable from the login modal's "Forgot password?" link; the /forgot-password route opens the modal (deep-link / emailed-link safe). Keep existing forgotPassword() logic + reCAPTCHA gating.

Acceptance: request sends the reset email; captcha gating preserved; "Back to log in" returns to the login step; /forgot-password opens the modal.

Depends on: Build "Reset Your Password" Modal UI.

Part of the Settings & Password-Recovery redesign (Frontend).
Refs: docs/brainstorm/05-06-2026/ui-setting-email-password/plan.md · brainstorming.md

Env: Development https://dev.villume.com
Account: Guest flow; no login required
Test Data: issue-1655@example.com; reCAPTCHA and forgot-password API were mocked in automation to verify frontend integration deterministically.
Scope Note: Confirmed with developer: /forgot-password route is no longer used, so deep-link route validation is out of scope for this issue.

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 Black open_login_dialog guest opens login -> shared show-login p-dialog renders Welcome back Desktop Pass
2 Black forgot_from_login click Forgot password? -> reset password modal opens inside shared auth p-dialog Desktop Pass
3 Black back_to_login click Back to log in -> returns to login form in auth p-dialog Desktop Pass
4 Gray captcha_gating valid email without captcha -> Send reset link remains disabled Desktop Pass
5 Gray submit_reset_request valid email + solved captcha -> POST /v1/auth/password/forgot sends email + token Desktop Pass
6 Task Sprint #1655 revised scope login link + modal + captcha gating + request send + back-to-login TP Pass

Frontend Status & Review

Area Expected Actual Review
Login popup integration Forgot link opens modal UI in shared auth dialog app-forgot-password-modal rendered inside .p-dialog.show-login Pass
Modal shell Uses auth modal card/form system .auth-card, form.auth-form, #forgot-email, Send reset link visible Pass
Login dialog handoff Login dialog closes when forgot modal opens app-login hidden while forgot modal is visible Pass
Back navigation Back to log in returns to login step Welcome back and app-login visible after click Pass
Captcha gating Submit disabled until valid email and captcha token exist Button stayed disabled until mock captcha callback fired Pass
Reset request Submit calls forgot-password endpoint with email and captcha token Captured one mocked POST /v1/auth/password/forgot with expected payload Pass
Confirmation Successful request shows sent-state feedback Check your inbox state displayed after mocked 200 response Pass

Response Code & Review

Request Response Content-Type Review
GET https://dev.villume.com/ Browser navigation succeeded SPA/SSR HTML Login dialog and forgot-password modal flow rendered.
GET https://www.google.com/recaptcha/api.js?... Mocked in automation JavaScript Used to verify captcha gating without external captcha dependency.
POST */v1/auth/password/forgot Mocked 200 in automation JSON Request payload included email: issue-1655@example.com and captcha token.

Code / DOM Review

Area Review
Login forgot link src/app/layouts/login/login.component.ts sets displayForgotPasswordDialog = true and hides login dialog. Runtime passed.
Modal component src/app/layouts/forgot-password-modal/forgot-password-modal.component.ts preserves captcha gating and calls mainService.forgotPassword(). Runtime passed.
Shared dialog src/app/layouts/layouts.component.html renders forgot-password modal in p-dialog with styleClass="show-login". Runtime passed from login flow.
Captcha DOM Runtime rendered [id^="captchaForgotModal-"][data-qa-recaptcha-rendered="true"] inside app-forgot-password-modal.
API payload Runtime captured POST body with { email: "issue-1655@example.com", token: "qa-recaptcha-token-1655" }.
Route note /forgot-password was removed from this QA scope after developer confirmation.
